headline: Verizon’s AI Disaster Tools Highlight Network Resilience And Valuation Gap
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has introduced AI-powered disaster response tools ahead of the 2026 hurricane season. The company is rolling out "Digital Twin" network modeling to test resilience and speed up recovery after severe weather. Verizon is also expanding satellite connectivity and off-road mobile 5G assets to support critical services and first responders. For investors watching NYSE:VZ, this update focuses on Verizon’s network capabilities rather than earnings or capital...
